name: 10-student mixed class
description: A mid-sized class with broader variation in achievement and participation.

class_features.understanding_profile: wide spread from very low to very high
class_features.question_tendency_profile: quiet students and high-question students coexist
class_features.motivation_profile: mixed motivation with several high-motivation students
class_features.misconception_profile: transposition and coefficient-division misconceptions are common
class_features.teacher_note: Use this class to test whether the lecture plan changes when low-score risk is present.
